star_1.text: Just like other games like this. It's a p2w, with lots of unbalanced opponents and other things. Slow progression, games are way too long, and mana generates too slowly. Even if you have high power cards, damage doesn't seem to matter. The sudden death section seems rng and not based on damage dealt to opponents "tower". The art style is nice, but that's all it's got going for it.

The game is absolutely a blast. I really do love the game itself. But the match making is broke. And the sudden death is too early. I don't like sudden at all actually. But if you could stretch it out a couple more rounds that would be helpful. The matchmaking is broke as it pits you against someone who's more than double your power and you have no chance right from the get-go. If you could fix the matchmaking it would be a five star. The matchmaking is so broke I can't even play.

Honestly the game really does have a lot of potential. The rewards were frequent and easy to obtain (hint: knowledge is power) but the real struggle comes with the actual gameplay: there is none. When it comes to actually playing the game there is no real strategy to follow. You can't place units where you want, you don't get to choose the ones you want and if by some chance you were winning and make it to sudden death you're probably going to lose. Game needs some serious work but has potential

This game kinda sucks because after you get pretty far in the ranks, you start to go against people with way over leveled guys and just keep losing. Everything is so expensive for no reason, and half the time, it's not worth it. Even if you try to be free to play, it won't work because everyone who is higher level has most likely spe t money. Overall, I would not recommend

Anyone with rockets spoils the game, I just let them win. Rockets should not be a part of the game. Down graded to 1 star. The rocket really kills the fun. It's sad because this is such a fun game. Also the ads are crazy, after each match you have to watch 1-2 30 second to 1.5 minute ad to get the most rewards.. and it's usually only about 100 coins even tho it takes tens of thousands for an upgrade.

Probably one of the worst/most imbalanced games I've played. the gameplay itself is pointless. There is no need for higher level combinations you just need the right units to drop at the right time. This game has just been thrown together. Awful. And don't get me started on the rocket card... what is even the point of trying to get to their side when you can just use that.. you should consider adding a unit that as soon as it hits the field the game is won. That would be really fun!
fun game if you are paired up with a reasonable opponent. developers don't update this game often. and there are still so many bugs. and support is awful for this game.

If you don't have Medallion, you will lose. Most of the players in the top tier use Medallion and without it, you simply cannot win. Till an update doesn't come where it addresses the issue, no more money being put into the game. Balancing sucks quite clearly. Edit: Yep, I've tried but if you don't have Medallion, you cannot win. It's the issue with these game developers. They don't understand how to balance things unfortunately. They want you to spend thousands of pounds on a single card.

The game is really good but there is a very serious spoiler in it. The rocket unit is the only one reason why I give the game one star only. It literally blows the whole experience. Strategy doesn't apply any more. The opponent doesn't even get close to my base, but still wins because of rocket unit. Why not to introduce a unit which ends a game as soon as you obtain it? That would entirely please paying players, without significant tactical skills.

At first, I gave 3 stars because I thought the game was a little imbalanced. So I spend 200 on a few things, only to realize that when you get to the leagues at 4k trophies, the game becomes as pay to win as it can get. Unplayable. Get ready to spend 1k+ to be competitive. Honestly, why would you allow a 5 star legendary on a 2k strength deck? Makes no sense. There is no deck growing. It should not be possible to get such strong cards so early in the game. Uninstalling, it's not worth my time.

Clearly filled with cheaters since some players manage to fill the board with units right as the game starts and make all of them Max Level in 2-3 waves. Can't even submit reports and to top it off, the P2W wall is real. After getting to a certain rank, either you spend money, or get sent back to the previous ranks. 10/10 would not play again.

A P2W game, The game was a good strategy game, but after the update, 23/4/23 its has completely been changed for the worst. The sudden death has been made into a joke, and you can determine who will win by checking the stats entering the game as the match making will put new players against the top 100 which just makes the game terrible, it can be fun when placed against an opposition of similar stats but that doesn't happen often and your left to quit the game instead of wasting time.

This game needs a lot of re working of the characters balances and the prices are ridiculous its a total pay to win game and I mean pay pay pay ,,,, weres the gold at to upgrade your heros that it costs from a 1000 to 7000 to upgrade low levels of heros but no gold to be found unless you pay over 200 gems for a couple of thousand in gold and the gems are 5 dollars for 100 gems 30 gems for 2 dollars so you have to spend 12 dollars to get 200 gems w.e that's not even the worst part,,,,,

Horrible game. Latest update pair's you with AI opponents that have decks you need to spend thousands of dollars to get. Very unfair match making, difficult to rank up and earn rewards. All they want is to take your money. Do not play. Have to spend a few thousand at least to be competitive with their bots. They don't match you with other humans. Maybe 1 in 100 games.

Only play this if you want to be constantly frustrated!! Great game concept.. terrible execution. Game is very fun at lower levels, but the way "battle power" affects units is so unbalanced! When you have 2000 battle power and you are fighting people with 8,000 battle power.. You can't win.. this game is nothing to do with skill or strategy but only your battle power.. which is purchased.... My win-loss goes from 8 out of 10 to 1 out of 10 when I have 25% of my opponent's battle power.

I wouldn't waste my time. It wasn't that bad of a game until I unlocked Arena 6. (3 stars max) Then I faced a person with all gem slots unlocked and 2 orange guys as I had 1 gem slot and also used 1 purple. And then 2× again. I just do co-op now. All the card prizes you win in the Events are time limited. So you literally have to pay for everything. Every epic and all the other highest cards they have. I thought Google was cracking down on these types of games?

COULD be great but instead it's a glorified cash grab just like royale. Balancing is terrible, matchmaking is a joke and your expected to spend thousands of gold to upgrade even though you get paid in pennies for winning. In the last 9 matches I played, 7 of them had right around double my power and 1 had almost triple. To sum up the game it takes a tiny bit of skill, a pool full of luck, and AT LEAST half your paycheck to get anywhere.

Extremely Unbalanced. Dont bother without 5 star legendary units. 60% of the time, I play against people that significantly exceed me in trophies and strength, the other 40% its swapped. The developers say they are working on it and matches are only based on trophies, and it depends on how long the search takes, but thats misleading because i get matches under 10 seconds in these catagories. They just want their play to win money. They desperately need to work on their algorithms. Deleting.

Very poorly made. Always playing against players with alot more cards and levels. No way to get the cards needed to even put up a fight against anyone without gambling money for the possibility of a better card. Unable to position your cards on the battlefield to have any sort of strategy or to choose which ones you want to make better. Just a random possibility to collect them further reducing any strategy in leveling your cards. Costs more than a big studio game to even get basic playability.

Was good until it suddenly started pairing me with opponents that are impossible to beat and obviously AI, as they have exactly the same power as all the other players. Can't give more than 1 star to a game that is impossible. Edit: new update came through. Now can never ever win a single game!!! deleted!! Used to be a great game but whoever is making these updates has no idea what they're doing. Clowns![

star_2.text: It's fun and I like it better than the other rush tower game. However, it crashes too often - you have to clear out all other apps for it to work. Then, the loading screens keep taking forever and the other side gets a wave in first, putting me at a major disadvantage. Two times in the last 5 games, I'm done for the night. These glitches are getting worse, not better and I'm glad I didn't spend any money though I was considering it.

From what I can tell I like the game but it's very slow right away. I Every time I try to play it gets so frustrating I put it away and do something else. Half the time it kicks me and the other half I seem to lose matches because it doesn't connect me til the match is over. Especially in co-op mode. I doubt I'll keep trying much longer if at all. Don't bother getting into it u will just be sorely disappointed

Matches take too long. Even at twice the power of another player you never even get to their castle so you have to wait until sudden death (30+ rounds). Matches are completely unbalanced when it comes to strength. Takes forever to earn coins. Only has PVP so far. When you start out purchases are 5 bucks, then suddenly it jumps to $20-$30. Just seems like a cheaper version of Rush Royale.

Game has promise, but there seems to be quite a few issues that aren't being addressed - first and foremost, I like my own music and audio, but when this game opens, music is stopped no matter what I do. After visiting the Discord, I see multiple posts about the same issue, as well as more regarding balance & unfair matchups. Not worth my time.

This game has potential, play some of their other games. So unbalanced, it's unplayable for me... I just got done with a match; went a full 30 rounds hit sudden death and boom lost. My opponent was losing all match they were down to 78 hp on their tower and they somehow beat me. This isn't the first time. I don't see how you can crush it all match and keep losing in sudden death. Only to realize the opponent has lower level cards and weaker champions. Maybe will test in the future.

Love the idea and game play but it takes so long to upgrade and get new characters that it gets really boring. You have to play with the same characters for months before advancing much. I got bored and quit playing, came back to the game just to realize why I quit in the first place. I've been playing for about 4 days now after coming back. I haven't gotten one new character and the match making for pvp is terrible.

The new update has absolutely destroyed the game. Everything you worked for upgrading certain aspects is gone. I played this game every night and even though I'm trying to stick through it, because I loved it, the new update has taken every bit of fun I used to have out of the game. They took something great and ruined it. They completely altered the game. It wasn't an update, it's literally a completely new game.

This is really a disappointing review for me to write. It has been a very long time since I have seen a game with this fantastic a style of play and by far the best guide to teach new players the game. But after making a brand new player purchase that I was charged for but never received, and the 100% random effects that the devs chose to implement making the outcome of the match rng instead of strategy....I can't suggest this game for people to pay money for. Fine for a once a day login f2p.

The game has alot of potential but the matches take way to long to complete and often they are very unbalanced in terms of power and card level. I often get pared with a opponent much stronger than me which also makes it very difficult for new players( like me) to progress. I also don't like that u can loose despite doing twice as much damage as your opponent. The matches feel like there won by luck and not skill. Over all the game isn't good and I won't be playing anymore

good game. but it keeps crashing in the middle of the games making you lose your tickets for nothing. usually when too many unit is summoned. also, unit summoned depends on your luck. you can get the same unit almost your entire board that doesnt help you winning. please fix the chat box. i cannot see what i am typing. it is all white, same color as the background.

The game itself is ok but matchmaking is often unbalanced and the ad delivery system is a p.o.s. Half the time after watching an ad the screen freezes with no way to return to game. Forced to restart and try again. I'm now on my 6th restart in a row. This is extremely frustrating when (successfully) watching an ad is one of the daily goals. I don't mind watching ads to get free progression, but make it work the first time please 😕

The most unbalanced game I have ever played. Rocket, Medalion, Coultist... You just cant win if you dont want to pay for gold cards! In rush royale you could make something just by playing the game. In this game, there is no sence if you are not ready to pay for success... Can you people please develop this game a little? Nothing has been changed for a year...

Interesting idea, but they can't seem to balance it. They're in their 8th season now and still launching sweeping complete game design changes that turn it into a new game. All changes so far have been slowly removing strategy in favor of randomness and adding new exclusively paid parts to the game that just put free and low paying players further and further behind.

This game would be fantastic if it weren't for greedy devs. Pop ups occur constantly, not just at start up, but throughout gameplay. Level rewards can only be obtained through ads. Half the quests involve ads. It's just an ad farm. Shame. Uninstalled.

The game was great until the last patch. Essentially broke the game. Strategy is now just whoever has the best cards vs the other opponent (paper/rock/scissors) wins. No more making strategic choices on when to upgrade mana that brought a ton of early strategy to the game. Now it's just a zergfest from the get go. Anomalies are a terrible idea too. You build and level up cards only to have it all randomize and leave too much to RNG to win.

I wanted to give this game 4 stars but the amount of game force closes I keep getting to then get no loot after spending 10 minutes in a game. Or joining a game and a guy already has an army coming at you before you load into the game is just wrong xD, maybe il come back when the game is a bit more stable, but seeing as there other game also is like this I doubt I will.

A game with some potential. Unfortunately the battle matching system is broken, often matching players against others twice, and sometimes even 3 times their might. This entirely ruins the experience when higher players have entirely overpowered units that also get bonuses from player strength and levels. At least the events are good, but all other matching is broken, ad summarized above.

man do i feel cheated... got totally addicted, paid for a season to collect cool things and help level up, then the entire game changes so all my upgrades are redundant because the literal game is played different now... i never pay money and this is why, always disappointed. game is fantastic, just unfair if you have already been playing and now have to start again.

Great game and fun to play but its really demotivating going against someone who has clearly spent money on the game and just losing making it hard to gain progress without spending. Also when watching ads for extra rewards I have been getting minute long ads recently and I didn't get that long of ads before. Lowering a star because of the amount of bots in this game get some real players

Just another pay to progress game. Looks good at a glance, but just another game that pits you against people with higher level cards than you. You can't balance a game that inherently does that. Some units are just OP out the gate. Blizzard is far too effective, and rockets, why do they get to bypass everything and hit the tower, with nothing to stop them?

star_3.text: I love the game concept. But has a long way to go balance wise to make it fun. Every game I play goes to sudden death and takes about 15 minutes to play. Heroes are too slow, do too little damage to actually do anything before the next wave spawns. Also, just remove blizzard from the game. It's such a broken spell. Everyone uses it and it kills most smaller units before they can do anything which makes using anything not bulky feel like garbage.

Slow slow slow and crashes constantly. Takes so long to load that match will have already started by the time I get there,, already in 3rd wave .. drives me nuts. Also if I watch a video, it'll crash and I'll lose the bonus also, I'll have to sit through the loading process all over again. I do really enjoy the game, it's fun so please fix these issues.

Fun game overall. My only issue is the co-op pairing system. It tells me that I need a certain power level to unlock each boss level, but once unlocked I'm getting paired with players well below what was required of me to be able to play that boss. It makes it really unfair when I have to carry the other player and often times fail because they lack the power. This should be fixed and I'll gladly give it five stars. Other than that, it's a great game.

It is a great game. After the last update it got extremely unbalanced with the gadget. It's just too OP. Also after watching an ad, the sound cuts off and you have to restart the game. Still under development so that's understandable, but at the same time, you already worry it might turn into a pay2win as this company always goes 100% for the money. New rate will come in the future for my update.

A decent game, but suffers from bad unit balance. Certain legendary cards are not only overpowered, but impossible to counteract since you go into battles blind. I.e the Medallion unit is so broken that if the enemy has it and you don't, you will lose 90% of the time. It's tiring to constantly see the Medallion gimmick, boosting a unit (often the Vampire) which is being protected by tanks + Running Bombs. In my opinion, any unit that isn't an actual minion but a passive one, should be deleted.

I really love this game!!! But the arena is stuck on the lvl 13 in chapter 5. I've been replaying and winning the same lvl the last 2 months. Also the gifts now are ONLY for epic cards, while I got some legendary cards pretty while ago. Plus, on the premium pass gifts, it keeps giving the same and the same, no matter the progress. I can understand that you need to push players to buy, but this is annoying. I don't know for how long will I be playing this game for NO progress at all...

While the game is enjoyable, there are some balance issues that detract from the overall experience. Additionally, I found the main screen to be overly cluttered with buy offers, which can be off-putting. In my opinion, these offers are quite pricey compared to those in other popular games

Been playing for a week or so. It's not bad, but I noticed that it was a bit unbalance when it comes to sudden death. I might have gotten a few hits on someone. They had no hits on me but because they were a slightly higher level their overall health was higher they still won. It should be based on %health not overall otherwise high levels will always have advantage over lower levels. It would also be nice to choose where mons are summoned on the field and be able to move them around.

What is the point of upgrading if it means nothing in the end (Sudden death) Even if my tower had less health , my team had enough strength to over take the opponent at the point of sudden death. This update makes no sense at all. game is instantly over if the other team has rockets. Or if they have the item that enhances vampire. Game matches an opponent that is double my power or even more. Update has killed the game. But keep trying team. Listen to the public.

The concept, being similar to other games, the developers have brought forth a lot of creativity. Being a new game, it is definitely shaking out some things. Too many battles are upsets, w/ 5 & 6 decks beating 7 & 8 decks. It is concering. Either players have created mods, and/or Bots have advantages. It's clear, something is not quite right. Its namesake game suffered the same issues at the beginning. My hope is that this one will evolve into a nice playable fair game too.

It's only fun when the game doesn't force me to wait to join until after my opponent has already taken two thirds of my health. I don't recommend ever playing the PvP unless you're absolutely fine with losing due to the game's terrible performance at matchmaking. Fix this for the love of God and Gaming, it's not cool to autolose a game.

Game was decently fun. Unfortunately after taking a few months break, none of the synergy between units are the same and so many mechanics have been changed that I have zero clue how to play anymore and even though I am league 1, I wait a very long time for matches which pair me with people who have only lvl 11 cards while I have a mix of 5 and 6. I think the strategy does more than the levels but it makes me feel they're a much higher rank than I.

it was really fun at the beginning but as you progress, i get matched with players that are like 2k+ above my battle power and crushes me like nothing. i dont know if its because of lack of players, but please fix the match making balance, its so discouraging to play when i lose to those players and keep getting matched like that 5 games in a row. just makes me want to quit

Been playing this game since it was released and love the concept, but I have never been able to get the top legendary cards; appears you have to spend money to purchase them, as I have cashed in a lot of magic dust and keep getting the same legendary cards I already have. This needs to be addressed.

I like that you tried a different approach to the arena rush game, BUT, the random factor is aweful, and makes strategy useless if I lose my tank to a random result and get a squishy archer, I could very well lose. Makes it frustrating instead of fun, add on top of that, the increase in cost each time and will lose your players eventually.

I like the game, it's fun. It's pay2play and I'm competing against the same players that are too advanced, so i can't get ahead and stay there. I can't get the upgrades I need, but I pay for upgrades I don't need. No sense in spending anymore money, but still fun to play.

This would be an excellent game, but for the constant crashes, losing bonuses for watching ads because the game resets, the co-op mode is so out of balance that you just get partners that are worthless. I am to the point that I don't want to play because of poor game balancing and crashes. Fun until it isn't.

The game would be great if it weren't dominated by a select group that are lucky enough to get one specific combo.......the medallion-mirror is ruining the game hands down.....spam any card and you win. There is no combo you can build that will win vs 50 of anything. I have been playing for a while and keep drawing trash draws of useless cards while struggling to keep up. Always loosing to similar decks.

I liked this game when it first came out and played it all the time. Now, after the last update, as far as I can tell, they have screwed up the win/loss scale so bad that it makes me not want to play anymore. I win a match, no matter how I play it, and the most I get is between 14-18 points. If I lose a match, I lose, AT MINIMUM, 45-53 points. If you lose 2 or 3 matches, you have fallen so far back down the scale that you can't make it up before the season ends. Too frustrating.

Great game very fun, good time killer but also mood killer blizzard is overpowered with freezing opponents, and being continuous attack, it needs to be like a 3 second attack and increase with upgraded card add like .25 seconds each upgrade, with continuous is almost impossible ( yes I have the card also ) and rockets shouldn't be able to kill off a tower it should take to a max minimum like 1000 hit points and then target enemies, either way those 2 are broken and destroy gameplay

star_4.text: Having played rush royale this game seems like both an advanced version and a more basic version at the same time. The layouts and concepts are all the same however the makers are still bankrupting you with stupidly over priced passes. Still hoping that the makers will make obtaining magic dust a bit easier to give you better chances to get legendary cards and level up without having to remortgage your house!

So far it's a pretty fun game only had it a couple days. I like that it's easier to earn gems for chest I wish they'd do that is rush Royale. 1 issue!!! It seems to be that everyone I play with has too many friends but it says 1/50 so idk if it's a glitch in the game but I'd be nice to get a patch for that! Looking forward to checking out the clans and tourneys UPDATE*** my only criticism is that some of the battles are seriously uneven otherwise 👍

Having watching ads as such a forced/integral part of the game really seems odd. And then when it doesn't work makes it all seem very frustrating. (watched 10 adds to get the chest, saw a popup which vanished, and had no chest to open) given this is the same as Rush Royale, there's no excuse for this aspect to be buggy

I have been playing for couple of months. It's stagnant at some point, and although the ads R not that disturbing.. But the purchases R quite expensive. They have launched "castle duels", which has a better game play in my opinion. It has no ads and the in-app purchases are way more affordable. Which means u also spend more.. 🤣

Same format and mechanics as Rush Royale, they did a great job. 4 stars because there's room for improvement. We also waiting for Clans & Events. There are some overpowered units in my opinion that needs to be nerfed. We need more quests as I always find myself lacking in those. And last but not least, the mana gain is so slow u can never go full mana and full units level in the same game, u either upgrade mana or units, feels like it takes forever, the charging rate is too slow, the amount's ok

Good game. Some P2W, but after a while, it's possible to get legendary cards without paying. I have made small purchases because I wanted to because I didn't feel forced to do so. There are still some imbalances and matches are sometimes wildly mismatched in that someone with 39000 base points are being matched with people with 19000 hp so even if you fend the other person off all 30 rounds you still lose in the end just because you have lower tower hp.... It's not a huge deal, just a deal 😆

I'm sure there are updates and upgrades yet to come for this game.. My issue is the time it takes to make monye and how much you offer for winning games. besides this factor, I love the game! Also it's a great passing time game... ... excited to see where you go with this game with thee upgrades

Daily player here.. it's Pretty good in itself. But it does have p2w features. Such as being able to buy gold grade cards right after tutorial... I'm only arena 4 (I think) and been playing daily for months. I know the struggles of winning 99% of the match and then being absolutely dominated at sudden death.. Also the matchmaking.. bruh. Let's say I had 2000 trophies.. I got matched with a 5000 trophy.. yeah OK... I got wrecked. It happens alot. I look forward to seeing where this game goes.

The in game graphics are smooth and characters are adorable. And gameplay style is quite different from other tower defense games. After all in brief I just playing this game not too long yet. So, I really expect what kind of excitement will be explored from this game.

Game mechanics are pretty good and gaming experience is quite satisfying. However, I've rated this 4 stars beacuse there aren't enough options for card progression- except for the paid offers, a painful thing to watch as an f2p player. Will recommend bigger victory and support chests and/or time-unlocked chests gained with victories.

Great game! Wish there was a way to receive chests more often. Maybe collect 3/4 and put timers to open them. Then add ads (for your pocket) to take 1hr off the time to open. Otherwise can't wait to see what else you do!

Great game enjoying the way you can turn the tides of battle pretty quickly keeps you on your toes.. but you do get the odd hacker you can tell because an army spawns way too uniform and in way too large a number would have thought they would have been more subtle about it

It's a fun game and I have put a lot of time into it but how come there hasn't been any updates to mechanics or balance or anything? I been playing it for at least 6 months now and it feels like the game has been abandoned. I see Rush Royale constantly getting updates but not this one.

I want to give this game five stars. The gameplay is fun andthe developers are responive to the community's concerns. But the problem is it is extremely expensive for an app game, and your progress almot relies in you buying the season pass. If they made their prices more reasonable this game would be perfect.
Game needs a way to buy out of commercials or way way less. Need to watch for basically any good reward. That being said the game is really fun. Add a way to buy out of commercials. I'd buy it.

Needs more legendary plus the speed of their movements needs to be improved. Other then that it is a fun game to play, hopefully I don't get higher rank players to battle against because I haven't seen them move up in rankings at all. Another thing should be added is if any player at those high rankings doesn't play the game they should start losing trophies every week. It'll be nice to see different people in first place.
Its fun, I wish you could make money a little faster to level up your characters. Love the new update on needing less cards to upgrade. Need the updates to join a clan and all the extra stuff.

Good game overall same concept but different feel from random pvp games . Only issue is the p2w at the moment . Basically if you pay for a legendary u win . And the legendary are scares compared to rushroyale I'm at arena 8 and I got 1 legendary and its one of the weaker ones please give more magic dust and legendary for the rewards in coop this things are hard

Missing Coop and Clan please. Especially the clan because of rewards. Other than that content a little lacking ; the game is balanced, i like the concept, compared to rush royale its a little more f2p since lots of characters are playable imo
The game is excellent made. She's thinking about it encompasses quite a few things from several different types of Match Games. The tutorials were ah bit short on explanation is all.

star_5.text: A really good game, rewards are really driving me to keep playing, characters and monsters are really diverse and unique, and players level are quiet similar to my level. Well done! By the way, are you looking for a junior with python and SQL knowledge? I didnt see too many options in your website :'-)

Pretty interesting game, I'm not a big fan of Castle Defense games and I prefer the tower defense game of theirs but this is pretty well-built too. It's very polished, and doesn't feel like it's made from a foreign country, it feels all very localized with the little tidbits of humor and phrases. It's actually fun, The Meta is kind of the same as the other game but it should also just be common sense having a good time as of now, going to definitely keep playing to see how the later levels are.

Rather show stats than video first on each card. New to the game. Been with rush royale since the beginning, so this is taking time getting use to. Players running away from you is a bit confusing, cant realy see what they doing. A lot of potencial, will stick with the game as the develop. Board should be a bit more like rush royal.

So this game is cool. Has it's own unique twist in tower defense. I'm new but, this game will depend on upgrading at later levels. The team balance seems endless. Right now it has my full attention. But I imagine this game getting harder, which is exciting. Rush arena needs to focus on getting more players. But other than that, runs smooth. I have low internet connection and enough phone space. No connection or glitch problems. Pvp is 4* Coop? I'm arena 4 or 5 right now.

Very similar to rush royal, which is another game I enjoy playing regardless of how much people slate the creators... Found this started playing and immediately fell in love with it! Only thing I don't agree with is how expensive the pass is.... It makes it difficult for someone like myself to want to support the Devs

I love this game so much the ads aren't that big of a deal and you don't need to spend money at all! I loved rush Royale but rush arena is better in my opinion and not as complicated! 5/5 stars for me her with little to no complaints!
Dear developer why I'm banned from playing events or tournament under reason of cheating even though I didn't do anything illegal

I honestly think this game is really good. The animations and the gameplay. I do have a question though which is do I vs real players because every time I find a match it always finds one at exactly 31 seconds all the time. I feel like Legendary hardest to get Legendaries vs starter commons are similar which kind of knocks down the motivation to keep playing. I think a major buff to the Legendary cards would be a lot better. But this game still deserves a 5 star in my opinion.

Just started so I haven't hit a paywall yet, but so far I'm having a lot of fun. I'm enjoying the game mechanics and learning the strategies that are most effective. Surprising depth for a mobile game.

This game is one of my favorite mobile games to play to pass time. Very possible to progress to great heights without paying for anything, fun gameplay, overall great game, fun to customize teams and effects

This is a nice game, but please fix the issue with your other game, Random Rush. It doesn't work, it doesn't run at all and when it does run it crashes after 2 minutes and ads are never available. Good job with your games, they are very nice to play.

Genuinely a fantastic game. The ads are weak compared to the real game. The fun is not gated by pay walls or ads, and the gameplay is smooth and intuitive. The Rush series is the next Clash series imo
Really like the game. It is somewhat similar to the Rush Royale, but it has new characters and you attack the other team, not monsters. Overall the game is somewhat addictive and entertaining.

I aways judge mobile games by their ability to be continuously played without hitting a timer wall. Be it a stamina bar, energy, turn based using time as the measurement of each turn. The longer you can play the better. I'd rather rage quit after a brutally close pvp match than having to quit playing and wait 4 hours for imaginary energy to replenish. Is this gluttony or sloth? Please advise!

Great game just like rush royale love it that's like a similar concept but diffrent gamemode I know it's pay2win but idk you can still have fun while playing f2p and it's not impossible to go up in ranks just takes more time and good strategy you just gotta get lucky when you open something up

Great game. You guys have built the game of the century, and ya did the same with rush royal. I play both, but I love this one the most great jobs guy in developing this game. I could keep going and going with all the great qualities of game play and development you guys rock.

I seriously spend so much time playing this game. But agree with below comment for matching players in pvp. It seems to keep me stuck on trophies keeping me in the same level, stage. League ect ;ect otherwise this game is absolutely my one and only '❤️'
Fun addition to Rush Royale, but it's still a new game, it still has a couple of things the devs need to iron out, nothing major, just unit tweaks and some additional functions.
The game's graphics is very nice and smooth,gameplay is awesome too!...But there are some imbalances i think,which if fixed,makes the game even better!

Nice player friendly game. Luckily no adds except you wamt some bonuses. Funny to play amd easy to understan dhow the mechanics work. If you played Rush Royale its nearly the same but good game idea. Well done and thanks
